heading: Omitted
label: 590c Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , , which exempted distributed funds from Federal and State income taxes and provided for payment of shares for minors and persons under legal disability, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 92–442, § 386 Stat. 744Sept. 29, 1972
